rulings.Case Title: PIRUZ VARGA VS. REGENTS UNIV., OF CALIFORNIA SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Deny Motion By Ara Tahmassian To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 13, 2010, line 10, PLAINTIFF PIRUZ VARGHA Motion To Deny Motion By Ara Tahmassian To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction. Off Calendar, not a proper motion. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: PIRUZ VARGA VS. REGENTS UNIV., OF CALIFORNIA SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 13, 2010, line 10, DEFENDANTS WILLIAM LEW, ROBERT EATON, KEITH CUDABACK, THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction. Motion denied. Personal jurisdiction may be exercised over defendant based upon his minimum contacts with California. When the claim arose, defendant was domiciled in California and employed as the associate vice chancellor for Research at UCSF. The lawsuit is closely related to defendant's activities or contacts with California. Defendant does not show why it would be unreasonable for court to exercise jurisdiction. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CHERYL D MARSHALL VS. CHILDREN'S COUNCIL OF SAN FRANCISCO; A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 13, 2010, line 11, DEFENDANT CHILDREN'S COUNSEL OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to seventh cause of action only. Plaintiff fails to distinquish "failure to take a corrective action" as a separate cause of action from harassment. Demurrer overruled as to all other causes of action. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: UWE EMERSON VS. GEORGE VALVERDE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 13, 2010, line 12, PETITIONER UWE EMERSON Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate. Petition denied. The court must apply a strong presumption of correctness to the agency's findings and decision. (Fukuda vs. City of Angels (1999) 20 Cal.4th 805.) Petitioner fails to satisfy his burden of proof that the agency's decision was contrary to the weight of the evidence, as Laufer's testimony is larely unreliabile. =(302/CWW)
